news.title: Novozymes Dividend Increase And Valuation Discount Catch Investor Attention
news.summary: Novozymes (CPSE:NSIS B) has approved a higher ordinary dividend at its recent Annual General Meeting. The new dividend level was formally adopted by shareholders as part of the AGM resolutions. The decision signals the board’s intention to return more cash to shareholders through regular payouts.
